title: Exposure of Sensitive Information due to Lack of Access Controls
description: Without defined data classification or granular access controls, sensitive data could be exposed to unauthorized users. This could occur through misconfigured permissions, insecure APIs, or vulnerabilities in the application logic.
attack_vector: Unauthorized access to data due to insufficient access controls, exposing sensitive information to unauthorized users or systems.
mitigations: Implement a robust data classification scheme and apply appropriate access controls based on the sensitivity of the data.
Regularly review and update access permissions.
Utilize encryption to protect sensitive data at rest and in transit.
